nodes.label:
Key Generation:
Choose primes p, q
n = p*q
φ(n) = (p-1)(q-1)
Choose e (coprime to φ(n))
Calculate d (d ≡ e⁻¹ mod φ(n))

Ciphertext C
C = Mᵉ mod n

Original Message M
M = Cᵈ mod n

visuals.title: RSA Encryption and Decryption Process
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">RSA Algorithm</text>
  
  <!-- Key Generation -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key Generation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Encryption -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Encryption
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Decryption -->
  <rect x="150" y="180" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Decryption
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Key Gen to Encryption -->
  <path d="M170 80 L250 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Encryption to Decryption -->
  <path d="M310 100 L310 180 L210 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Key Gen to Decryption -->
  <path d="M110 100 L110 180 L150 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Public Key -->
  <rect x="270" y="110" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Public Key
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Private Key -->
  <rect x="70" y="110" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Private Key
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Plain Text -->
  <rect x="290" y="30" width="60" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Plain Text
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Cipher Text -->
  <rect x="290" y="150" width="60" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Cipher Text
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Decrypted Text -->
  <rect x="170" y="230" width="80" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Decrypted Text
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow showing plain text flow -->
  <path d="M320 50 L320 60" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow showing cipher text flow -->
  <path d="M320 100 L320 110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow showing decrypted text flow -->
  <path d="M210 180 L210 190" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
